summary: Official Task Binary Fix: the build downloads and SHA-256-verifies Google's compatible task asset, then self-hosts it locally with a cache-busted release URL.
features: Checksum-pinned Google MediaPipe HandLandmarker task asset synchronized before every deploy build
Strict rejection of the legacy locally-assembled task bundle that caused Android normalization metadata errors
Self-hosted runtime and model delivery after build; no model download during app use
Cache-busted local model URL so old service-worker entries cannot serve the rejected bundle
CPU-first local MediaPipe hand-engine initialization for reliable Android camera inference
Separate camera and hand-engine recovery states with visible diagnostics
